title: Meridian FinTech — Enterprise Security Risk Assessment
description: Comprehensive security risk assessment and compliance framework for a simulated FinTech organization, covering threats, vulnerabilities, and mitigation strategies.
content: Conducted a comprehensive security risk assessment for Meridian FinTech Solutions, a simulated FinTech organization.
Identified security threats, vulnerabilities, and potential business impacts across organizational assets.
Developed structured risk mitigation and countermeasure strategies aligned with industry best practices.
Evaluated compliance requirements and provided recommendations to strengthen security governance.
Produced an enterprise-focused risk assessment and compliance framework report.

title: ShellSentry — Secure Natural Language to Bash Execution
description: Senior project: an AI-powered platform that translates natural language into validated, secure Bash commands for remote Linux execution via SSH.
content: Designed and developed an AI-powered secure command execution platform for Linux environments.
Implemented natural language processing capabilities to translate user requests into validated Bash commands.
Developed security controls to prevent unsafe, unauthorized, or malicious command generation.
Built a command validation layer to verify commands before execution on remote systems via SSH.
Integrated Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with FAISS to provide context-aware and secure responses.

title: Secure Messenger
description: Cross-platform messaging app with end-to-end encrypted secret chats, biometric auth, and Firebase-backed real-time features.
content: Developed a secure cross-platform messaging application using Flutter and Firebase.
Implemented end-to-end encrypted (E2EE) secret chats using RSA key exchange and AES-GCM encryption.
Integrated biometric authentication, group messaging, media sharing, and QR-based contact discovery.
Configured Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) push notifications through Cloud Functions.
Applied Firestore and Firebase Storage security rules and developed unit tests for core services.

title: Social Network Platform
description: Full-stack social platform with profiles, posts, groups, events, and real-time messaging — built with Vue 3, Go, and WebSockets.
content: Developed a full-stack social networking platform featuring profiles, posts, followers, groups, events, and real-time communication.
Designed and implemented a Go REST API with over 70 endpoints to support platform functionality.
Built WebSocket services for real-time messaging, notifications, and live updates.
Implemented privacy controls, media uploads, group invitations, and event RSVP functionality.
Containerized the application using Docker and deployed it with Nginx.
